summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this inventory shard. Nine non-security PRs should remain open for their existing proof, review, rebase, or maintainer-review path. #89039 is quarantined with exact-ref route_security per deterministic validation, so ProjectClownfish should not close, merge, label, comment on, or fix that PR in this job.
